prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年中国海洋大学在上海市综合类最低录取位次分别为约8283名、7633名、8464名、9186名、8579名，整体呈先降后升的V型波动：2022年短暂冲高后回 落，2024年降至近年最低点9186名，2025年回升至8579名，近两年波动幅度约600名，2025年基准位次为8579名；该校在上海市综合类招生计划2021年12人、202 2年14人、2023年16人、2024年15人、2025年19人，呈逐年扩招趋势；2026年招生计划为27人，较2025年增加8人，扩招幅度约42%，为近六年最大扩招幅度，显著增加 了招生名额供给。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国海洋大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年持续上升，2021年第56名、2022年第57名、2023年第62名、2024 年第57名、2025年第56名、2026年第51名，排名稳步提升，体现了学校综合实力的增强；2023年声誉评价曾因小语种专业位次下降6211位而偏负面，但属个别专 业现象；抖音热度排名第21位（综合热度约243万），评价为"较热"，在985高校中处于中等偏上水平；2026年声誉文件中未出现中国海洋大学的明显负面事件，整体舆情平稳。投 档异常记录显示2023年小语种专业位次下降，但未影响整体校线位次走势；第五轮学科评估中，海洋科学、水产获评A+（全国顶尖），生物学、食品科学与工程 获评A-，共4个A-及以上学科，海洋特色鲜明。招生专业中海洋科学（A+）、生物科学类（生物学A-）、食品科学与工程类（食品科学与工程A-）等均对应优势学科。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度数据显示，计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程为高热推荐专业，中国海洋大学开设计算机类等热门工科专业；新闻传播学类为明显劝退专业，该 校也设有该专业。上海市2026年高考考生总数约66700人，较2025年49276人增长约35%，考生规模大幅增加，竞争显著加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合以上因素：2025年基准位次8579名，2026年大幅扩招42%使招生名额显著增加，按供需弹性原理将 推低位次数字（更难进）；同时上海市2026年考生总数增长约35%，竞争加剧进一步推高位次数字；学校软科排名持续上升、抖音热度较热等正面因素也吸引更多考生报考。，考虑考生规模激增的额外竞争压力，预测2026年最低录取位次约10776名，区间10276–11276名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 海洋科学
- 计算机类（含计算机科学与技术、智能科学与技术、数据科学与大数据技术等）
- 大气科学
- 港口航道与海岸工程
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 生物科学类（含生态学、生物技术、生物科学）
- 药学
- 食品科学与工程类（含食品科学与工程、食品营养与健康）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 国际经济与贸易
- 新闻传播学类（含新闻学、网络与新媒体）
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年中国海洋大学在上海市综合类预测最低位次约10776名，区间10276–11276名。位次在10276名以内的考生可重点冲刺一档专业（海洋科学、计算机类、大气科学等王牌和热 门专业）；位次在10776名左右的考生应以二档专业（生物科学类、药学、食品科学与工程类）为主攻方向，兼顾一档冲刺；位次在11276名附近的考生建议以三档专业（国际经济 与贸易、新闻传播学类）保底，同时关注二档专业是否有机会。鉴于2026年大幅扩招，整体录取位次后移，位次在9000–10000名的考生也有一定希望进入该校。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Ocean University of China in Shanghai's comprehensive category were approximately 8283, 7633, 8464, 9186, and 8579, showing a V-shaped fluctuation of first decreasing then increasing: a brief rise in 2022 followed by a decline, reaching the lowest point in recent years at 9186 in 2024, then rebounding to 8579 in 2025, with a fluctuation range of about 600 places in the last two years, and a baseline ranking of 8579 in 2025; the enrollment plan for the comprehensive category in Shanghai was 12 in 2021, 14 in 2022, 16 in 2023, 15 in 2024, and 19 in 2025, showing a trend of gradual expansion; the 2026 enrollment plan is 27, an increase of 8 from 2025, an expansion rate of about 42%, the largest expansion in the past six years, significantly increasing the supply of admission slots.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Ocean University of China is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; its ranking in the Shanghai Ranking's Best Chinese Universities has been steadily rising in recent years, at 56th in 2021, 57th in 2022, 62nd in 2023, 57th in 2024, 56th in 2025, and 51st in 2026, reflecting the enhancement of the university's comprehensive strength; in 2023, the reputation evaluation was somewhat negative due to a 6211-place drop in the ranking of minor language majors, but this was an individual major phenomenon; Douyin popularity ranking is 21st (comprehensive popularity about 2.43 million), rated as "relatively hot," at an upper-middle level among 985 universities; the 2026 reputation document shows no significant negative events for Ocean University of China, with overall public sentiment stable. Abnormal filing records show a drop in the ranking of minor language majors in 2023, but it did not affect the overall school line ranking trend; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Marine Science and Aquaculture were rated A+ (top in the country), Biology and Food Science and Engineering were rated A-, with a total of 4 disciplines at A- or above, highlighting distinctive marine characteristics. Among the admission majors, Marine Science (A+), Biological Sciences (Biology A-), and Food Science and Engineering (Food Science and Engineering A-) all correspond to advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity data shows that Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly recommended hot majors, and Ocean University of China offers popular engineering majors such as Computer Science; Journalism and Communication is a clearly discouraged major, and the university also offers this major. The total number of college entrance exam takers in Shanghai in 2026 is about 66,700, an increase of about 35% from 49,276 in 2025, with a significant increase in the number of candidates, leading to intensified competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering all factors: the baseline ranking in 2025 is 8579, and the significant expansion of 42% in 2026 substantially increases admission slots, which, according to supply-demand elasticity, will push the ranking number lower (harder to get in); at the same time, the total number of candidates in Shanghai in 2026 increases by about 35%, intensifying competition and further pushing the ranking number higher; positive factors such as the continuous rise in the Shanghai Ranking and relatively hot Douyin popularity also attract more candidates to apply. Taking into account the additional competitive pressure from the surge in candidate numbers, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 10776, with a range of 10276–11276.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Marine Science
- Computer Science (including Computer Science and Technology, Intelligent Science and Technology, Data Science and Big Data Technology, etc.)
- Atmospheric Science
- Port, Waterway and Coastal Engineering
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Biological Sciences (including Ecology, Biotechnology, Biological Science)
- Pharmacy
- Food Science and Engineering (including Food Science and Engineering, Food Nutrition and Health)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- International Economics and Trade
- Journalism and Communication (including Journalism, Network and New Media)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Ocean University of China in Shanghai's comprehensive category is about 10776, with a range of 10276–11276. Candidates with rankings within 10276 can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors (Marine Science, Computer Science, Atmospheric Science, etc., which are flagship and popular majors); candidates around ranking 10776 should target Tier 2 majors (Biological Sciences, Pharmacy, Food Science and Engineering) as the main direction, while also considering sprinting for Tier 1; candidates near ranking 11276 are advised to use Tier 3 majors (International Economics and Trade, Journalism and Communication) as safety options, while also monitoring opportunities for Tier 2 majors. Given the significant expansion in 2026, the overall admission ranking shifts backward, and candidates with rankings between 9000 and 10000 also have some hope of entering this university.
